presetReasons: Don't qualify — not in service area
Didn't have homestudy ready in time
Waiting on home study to complete

grants.name: Gift of Adoption Fund
grants.details: Grants awarded to qualified applicants for domestic, international, and relative adoptions. One of the largest adoption grant programs available. Requires completed home study.

grants.name: Helpusadopt.org
grants.details: Need-based grants paid directly to licensed adoption agencies or lawyers. Open to individuals/couples regardless of race, religion, gender, ethnicity, marital status, or sexual orientation. Avg grant ~$6,409.

grants.name: A Child Waits Foundation
grants.details: Specifically for domestic infant/child adoption. Grants awarded weekly; can apply after completing homestudy. Committed to reducing financial barriers to adoption.

grants.name: Lifesong for Orphans
grants.details: Offers direct grants, matching grants, interest-free loans, and mySTORY fundraising. Applications reviewed quarterly. Crowdfunding pages tied directly into adoption accounts for approved families.

grants.name: Adoption Hope Foundation
grants.details: Breaking the financial barrier of adoption by providing grants for those building families through adoption. Requires valid home study from licensed agency.

grants.name: Both Hands C.A.R.E.
grants.focus: Adoption costs / post-adoption / orphan care ministries
grants.details: In 2025, C.A.R.E. gave two families $3,000 adoption grants. Funds can be raised for adoption costs, post-adoption needs, or orphan care ministries.

grants.name: ABBA Fund
grants.details: Adoption assistance for Christian families. Provides grants to help reduce the financial burden of adoption.

grants.name: Buescher Foundation
grants.details: Has helped over 90 families adopt a child domestically. Provides adoption grants to families.

grants.name: AdoptTogether
grants.details: Non-profit crowdfunding platform bridging the gap between families who want to adopt and children who need loving homes.

grants.name: Adoption Is Love Fund
grants.details: Provides grants to help cover adoption expenses. Requires completed home study.

grants.name: Dave Thomas Foundation for Adoption
grants.details: Various resources including the annual Frosty 5K Run for Adoption. Maintains a comprehensive financial resources page listing 10+ programs including Help Us Adopt and state-specific programs.

grants.name: National Adoption Foundation
grants.details: Helps offset expenses directly associated with the adoption process. Outright grants to offset adoption expenses.

grants.name: Adopt America Network — Military Grant
grants.details: For active-duty service members. Reimbursements up to $2,000 per child also available through other programs.

grants.name: Associates Home Loan Adoption Grant
grants.details: $1,000 grant awarded twice per year to families with adoption cost burdens.

grants.name: IRS Adoption Credit (2026)
grants.details: Federal tax credit up to $17,670 per child for qualified adoption expenses; portion is refundable. Available for domestic, international, and foster care adoptions.

grants.name: Employer Adoption Assistance (2026)
grants.details: Up to $17,670 can be excluded from income as tax-free employer reimbursement. Many major employers cover it. Some employers (e.g., US Military) provide additional financial assistance and leave. Check with HR about FSA-eligible adoption expenses.

grants.name: Title IV-E Adoption Assistance
grants.details: Federal matching funds (50–83% depending on state) for adoption assistance payments. For families adopting children with special needs from foster care. Negotiated with your agency/state.

grants.name: Show Hope Adoption Aid Grant
grants.details: Show Hope is currently accepting applications for their Adoption Aid grant. These grants help families pursuing domestic or international adoption. Their current application window is open through June 30th — don't miss this one!

grants.name: Here I Am Orphan Ministries — Adoption Grant & Loan Program
grants.amount: Varies (Grant + Loan program for Christian families)
grants.details: Specifically for Christian families adopting waiting children — older kids, special needs, or sibling groups. Out-of-state families welcome. Applications due soon!

grants.name: Help Us Adopt
grants.deadline: Rolling — no deadline (six award cycles per year)
grants.details: One of the most generous adoption grants available. Six award cycles per year. Open to all regardless of ethnicity, gender, marital status, religion, or sexual orientation. They're awarding $2.7 million in grants in 2025 alone!

grants.name: A Child Waits Foundation — Domestic Adoption Grant
grants.details: Specifically for domestic adoption! Grants are awarded weekly. Apply any time after you have a completed homestudy.

grants.name: ABBA Fund — Christian Family Adoption Grant
grants.deadline: No deadline — apply anytime after home study
grants.details: Christian-focused grant program. Has provided over $9 million in adoption assistance. No application deadline — apply anytime after completing your home study and accepting a match.

grants.name: Lifesong for Orphans — Matching Grants
grants.deadline: Rolling — as donations come in for your family
grants.details: Matching grant program that mobilizes the Body of Christ to support your adoption journey. Raises funds through their network of supporters.

grants.name: America's Christian Credit Union
grants.focus: Christian families, must join credit union
grants.details: Grant/loan program for Christian families pursuing adoption. Must be a credit union member. Up to $500 per grant, available up to 4 times per year.

grants.name: Angels in Disguise
grants.details: Adoption grant program for families pursuing adoption. Amount varies based on need and availability.

grants.name: Children Need Families
grants.details: Adoption grant program providing assistance to families. Generous grant range of $5k to $25k for qualifying families.

grants.name: Chosen for Life Ministries
grants.details: Faith-based adoption grant program for Christian families pursuing adoption.

grants.name: Connected Hearts Ministry
grants.details: Matching grant program for Christian families. Provides up to $1,000 in matching funds for adoption expenses.

grants.name: Dream 4 Adoption
grants.details: Provides home study grants of $1,500 to help families cover the cost of their home study, a key step in the adoption process.

grants.name: Families Outreach Inc.
grants.details: Adoption grant program providing financial assistance to families pursuing adoption.

grants.name: God's Grace Adoption Ministry
grants.details: Faith-based adoption ministry providing grants to Christian families pursuing adoption.

grants.name: Golden Dawn Adoption Assistance
grants.details: Adoption assistance program providing financial support to families pursuing adoption.

grants.name: Katelyn's Fund
grants.details: Adoption grants up to $3,000 from Katelyn's Fund Orphan Ministry (Sioux Center, IA) for Christian families.

grants.name: Laurel's Message — Hannah's Halo
grants.details: Post-placement adoption grant providing support to families after placement. Part of the Laurel's Message program.

grants.name: Laurel's Message — Lucy's Love
grants.details: Medical needs adoption grant providing up to $15,000 for families adopting children with medical needs. Part of the Laurel's Message program.

grants.name: Lauryn's Promise
grants.details: Faith-based adoption grant for Christian families pursuing adoption. Provides financial assistance to help cover adoption costs.

grants.name: Lifetime Adoption Foundation
grants.details: Adoption grant program through Lifetime Adoption, providing financial assistance to families pursuing adoption.

grants.name: Mighty Families By Adoption
grants.details: Adoption grant program with two application cycles per year (May and November). Provides varying amounts based on need.

grants.name: Military Adoption Reimbursement (DoD)
grants.details: Department of Defense program that reimburses active duty military families up to $2,000 per child for qualifying adoption expenses. Must be submitted within 2 years of placement.

grants.name: Milk Glass Candle Co.
grants.details: Adoption grant program with a specific application window from July 1 to September 1. Amount varies based on seasonal fundraising.

grants.name: Muskogee Church of Christ
grants.details: Church-based adoption grant program providing financial assistance to Christian families pursuing adoption.

grants.name: Open Hearts for Orphans
grants.details: "Say Yes" grant program for families adopting children with special needs including Down syndrome and congenital heart defects.

grants.name: Pathways for Little Feet
grants.details: Interest-free adoption loans (up to ~$10,000) rather than outright grants; repayments fund future families.

grants.name: Sparrow Fund
grants.details: Adoption grant program providing financial assistance to families. Focuses on reducing financial barriers to adoption.

grants.name: The Anna Cheri Foundation
grants.details: Adoption grant foundation providing financial assistance to families pursuing adoption.

grants.name: Kidsave CMOMA Grant Program
grants.details: Successor to the CMomA (Childless Mothers Adopt) gifting program, now run by Kidsave. Grants for adoptive families.

grants.name: The Tinina Q. Cade Foundation
grants.details: Family building grant providing up to $10,000. Supports both adoption and fertility treatment for qualifying families.

grants.name: WAT! Black Family Adoption Assistance
grants.details: Adoption assistance program specifically for Black and African American families, providing up to $5,000 to help cover adoption costs.

grants.name: We Care for Orphans Adoption Fund
grants.details: Loan and matching grant program providing $2,000 to $5,000 for families pursuing adoption. Funds help cover adoption-related expenses.

grants.name: Nightlight Christian Adoptions Foundation Grant
grants.details: Small grant program for families adopting through Nightlight Christian Adoptions. Must meet with a Family Resource Specialist and create an AdoptionBridge crowdfunding page.
